requirement_topic.en: INMETRO Compulsory Certification — conformity mark and OCP assessment for three-phase induction motors
requirement_topic.zh: INMETRO 强制认证 — 三相感应电机的合格标志与 OCP 评定
requirement_topic.zht: INMETRO 強制認證 — 三相感應電機的合格標誌與 OCP 評定

summary.en: Three-phase induction motors are included in the INMETRO compulsory certification scope under Brazil's national energy-efficiency and product-safety framework. The legal basis derives from Lei 10.295/2001 (National Energy Efficiency Policy), Decreto 4.059/2001, and Lei 9.933/1999 (which establishes INMETRO's general compulsory certification authority). INMETRO issues Portarias that list specific motor types and power ranges subject to compulsory certification. Before a motor can be commercially sold, distributed, or imported for use in Brazil, the manufacturer or importer must obtain an INMETRO certificate of conformity issued by an INMETRO-accredited OCP (Organismo de Certificação de Produto — Product Certification Body). The OCP must be accredited by CGCRE (INMETRO's accreditation arm). Testing must be performed at CGCRE-accredited laboratories applying ABNT NBR 17094, ABNT NBR IEC 60034-2-1, and the INMETRO-specified efficiency portaria. The certificate must be kept current and motors must carry the INMETRO conformity mark (selo de identificação da conformidade) on the nameplate or body. [Note: The specific Portaria number(s) establishing compulsory certification scope for three-phase induction motors — including power range boundaries — should be verified directly at inmetro.gov.br/dconf or the INMETRO compulsory products catalogue, as Portaria numbers are subject to revision.]
summary.zh: 三相感应电机属于巴西 INMETRO 强制认证范围，法律依据源于 Lei 10.295/2001（国家能源效率政策）、Decreto 4.059/2001 及 Lei 9.933/1999（确立 INMETRO 强制认证总体权力）。INMETRO 发布部令（Portaria），列明须接受强制认证的特定电机类型和功率范围。电机在巴西商业销售、分销或进口使用之前，制造商或进口商须从 INMETRO 认可的 OCP（产品认证机构）取得 INMETRO 合格证书。OCP 须经 CGCRE（INMETRO 的认可机构）认可，测试须在 CGCRE 认可实验室按 ABNT NBR 17094、ABNT NBR IEC 60034-2-1 及 INMETRO 规定的能效部令进行。证书须保持有效，电机铭牌或机身须带有 INMETRO 合格标志（conformidade 标识）。【注：确定三相感应电机强制认证范围（含功率范围边界）的具体部令编号，应直接于 inmetro.gov.br/dconf 或 INMETRO 强制性产品目录中核实，因部令编号可能修订。】
summary.zht: 三相感應電機屬於巴西 INMETRO 強制認證範圍，法律依據源於 Lei 10.295/2001（國家能源效率政策）、Decreto 4.059/2001 及 Lei 9.933/1999（確立 INMETRO 強制認證總體權力）。INMETRO 發布部令（Portaria），列明須接受強制認證的特定電機類型和功率範圍。電機在巴西商業銷售、分銷或進口使用之前，製造商或進口商須從 INMETRO 認可的 OCP（產品認證機構）取得 INMETRO 合格證書。OCP 須經 CGCRE（INMETRO 的認可機構）認可，測試須在 CGCRE 認可實驗室按 ABNT NBR 17094、ABNT NBR IEC 60034-2-1 及 INMETRO 規定的能效部令進行。證書須保持有效，電機銘牌或機身須帶有 INMETRO 合格標誌（conformidade 標識）。【注：確定三相感應電機強制認證範圍（含功率範圍邊界）的具體部令編號，應直接於 inmetro.gov.br/dconf 或 INMETRO 強制性產品目錄中核實，因部令編號可能修訂。】

standards_or_laws: Lei 9.933/1999 — Dispõe sobre as competências do INMETRO (general compulsory certification authority)
Lei 10.295/2001 — Política Nacional de Conservação e Uso Racional de Energia (energy-efficiency mandate)
INMETRO Portaria(s) on compulsory certification for three-phase induction motors (verify current Portaria number(s) and scope at inmetro.gov.br — specific numbers unverified)
ABNT NBR 17094 — Máquinas elétricas girantes — Motores de indução trifásicos de baixa tensão
ABNT NBR IEC 60034-2-1 — Methods for determining losses and efficiency of rotating electrical machines

summary.en: Standard industrial three-phase induction motors are generally not subject to mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) pre-market certification in China. The CNCA compulsory certification catalogue covers specific product categories (including some electrical equipment), but standard industrial three-phase motors fall outside the current compulsory CCC scope. Manufacturers must comply with the mandatory efficiency standard GB 18613-2020 for domestic sale, but no equivalent pre-market third-party certification body assessment is required before placing standard industrial motors on the Chinese domestic market. Export from China to Brazil does not benefit from any bilateral mutual recognition agreement with INMETRO.
summary.zh: 标准工业三相感应电机在中国通常不须接受强制性 CCC（强制性产品认证）上市前认证。CNCA 强制认证目录涵盖特定产品类别（包括部分电气设备），但标准工业三相电机目前不在强制 CCC 范围内。制造商在国内销售须符合强制性 GB 18613-2020，但在中国国内市场销售标准工业电机前，无需由上市前第三方认证机构进行等效评定。自中国出口至巴西不享有任何与 INMETRO 的双边互认协议。
summary.zht: 標準工業三相感應電機在中國通常不須接受強制性 CCC（強制性產品認證）上市前認證。CNCA 強制認證目錄涵蓋特定產品類別（包括部分電氣設備），但標準工業三相電機目前不在強制 CCC 範圍內。製造商在國內銷售須符合強制性 GB 18613-2020，但在中國國內市場銷售標準工業電機前，無需由上市前第三方認證機構進行等效評定。自中國出口至巴西不享有任何與 INMETRO 的雙邊互認協議。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (三相异步电动机能效限定值及能效等级 — mandatory minimum efficiency; no OCP pre-certification equivalent)
CNCA CCC compulsory catalogue (standard industrial three-phase motors generally not listed — verify current edition at cnca.gov.cn)

gap.en: This is the single most significant market-access gap for Chinese motor exporters to Brazil. China imposes no pre-market third-party OCP certification for standard industrial motors; Brazil mandates it. The gap has four dimensions: (1) Structural — an INMETRO-accredited OCP must assess the product; Chinese factory self-declarations or GB-based certificates are not accepted; (2) Testing — laboratory tests must be conducted or witnessed by the OCP at CGCRE-accredited labs applying ABNT standards; Chinese GB/T 1032 test reports are not directly transferable; (3) Timeline — OCP certification for a new motor type typically requires 4–9 months from sample submission to certificate issuance; (4) Ongoing obligation — the INMETRO certificate must be kept current, and production surveillance audits by the OCP are typically required annually. There is no mutual recognition treaty between INMETRO/CGCRE and Chinese CNAS-accredited labs or Chinese CB Scheme certificates for this product category.
gap.zh: 这是中国电机出口商进入巴西市场最重要的单一差距。中国对标准工业电机不要求上市前第三方 OCP 认证；巴西则强制要求。差距体现在四个维度：(1) 结构性——须由 INMETRO 认可的 OCP 对产品进行评定；工厂自我声明或基于 GB 的证书不被接受；(2) 测试——实验室测试须由 OCP 在 CGCRE 认可实验室按 ABNT 标准进行或见证；GB/T 1032 测试报告不可直接转用；(3) 时间——新型电机的 OCP 认证从样品提交到颁发证书通常需要 4–9 个月；(4) 持续义务——INMETRO 证书须保持有效，OCP 通常每年须进行生产监督审核。对该产品类别，INMETRO/CGCRE 与中国 CNAS 认可实验室或中国 CB 计划证书之间不存在互认条约。
gap.zht: 這是中國電機出口商進入巴西市場最重要的單一差距。中國對標準工業電機不要求上市前第三方 OCP 認證；巴西則強制要求。差距體現在四個維度：(1) 結構性——須由 INMETRO 認可的 OCP 對產品進行評定；工廠自我聲明或基於 GB 的證書不被接受；(2) 測試——實驗室測試須由 OCP 在 CGCRE 認可實驗室按 ABNT 標準進行或見證；GB/T 1032 測試報告不可直接轉用；(3) 時間——新型電機的 OCP 認證從樣品提交到頒發證書通常需要 4–9 個月；(4) 持續義務——INMETRO 證書須保持有效，OCP 通常每年須進行生產監督審核。對該產品類別，INMETRO/CGCRE 與中國 CNAS 認可實驗室或中國 CB 計劃證書之間不存在互認條約。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — INMETRO compulsory certification with OCP assessment is required before commercial sale or import of in-scope three-phase induction motors into Brazil; non-certified products may not be sold or imported
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable for export — no equivalent mandatory pre-market OCP certification for standard industrial three-phase motors in China; GB 18613-2020 MEPS compliance is mandatory for domestic sale only

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia (official)

compliance_verdict.en: INMETRO compulsory certification through an accredited OCP is a non-negotiable prerequisite for placing three-phase induction motors on the Brazilian market. No Chinese certificate, test report, or mark substitutes for it. Exporters must engage an INMETRO-accredited OCP (verify current accredited OCPs at inmetro.gov.br), submit motor samples, complete testing at CGCRE-accredited labs under ABNT standards, and obtain and maintain the INMETRO certificate before first shipment. This process typically requires 4–9 months lead time.
compliance_verdict.zh: 通过认可 OCP 取得 INMETRO 强制认证，是将三相感应电机投放巴西市场不可或缺的前提条件。任何中国证书、测试报告或标志均不能替代。出口商须与 INMETRO 认可的 OCP 合作（于 inmetro.gov.br 核实现行认可 OCP 名单），提交电机样品，在 CGCRE 认可实验室按 ABNT 标准完成测试，并在首次发货前取得并维护 INMETRO 证书。此过程通常需要 4–9 个月准备周期。
compliance_verdict.zht: 通過認可 OCP 取得 INMETRO 強制認證，是將三相感應電機投放巴西市場不可或缺的前提條件。任何中國證書、測試報告或標誌均不能替代。出口商須與 INMETRO 認可的 OCP 合作（於 inmetro.gov.br 核實現行認可 OCP 名單），提交電機樣品，在 CGCRE 認可實驗室按 ABNT 標準完成測試，並在首次發貨前取得並維護 INMETRO 證書。此過程通常需要 4–9 個月準備週期。

requirement_topic.en: Import clearance — SISCOMEX registration, NCM classification, and II import duty for electric motors
requirement_topic.zh: 进口清关 — SISCOMEX 注册、NCM 商品分类及电机进口税（II）
requirement_topic.zht: 進口清關 — SISCOMEX 注冊、NCM 商品分類及電機進口稅（II）

summary.en: Importing electric motors into Brazil requires compliance with the SISCOMEX (Sistema Integrado de Comércio Exterior) import registration system administered by the Secretaria Especial de Comércio Exterior e Assuntos Internacionais (SECEX) and the Receita Federal (Brazilian IRS). The importer must be registered in SISCOMEX and hold a valid RADAR (Sistema de Rastreamento da Atuação dos Intervenientes Aduaneiros) access licence. Electric motors are classified under NCM (Nomenclatura Comum do Mercosul, the Mercosur common tariff nomenclature, aligned with HS): three-phase AC induction motors commonly fall under NCM heading 8501.52 (AC motors, multi-phase, power exceeding 750 W but not exceeding 75 kW) or related headings depending on power rating. The Imposto de Importação (II — import duty) rate for electric motors varies by NCM subheading and may be subject to Mercosur common external tariff (TEC) rates and applicable trade agreements. The INMETRO conformity certificate is required as a supporting document at customs clearance — motors without a valid INMETRO certificate will be blocked at the border. Additionally, IPI (Imposto sobre Produtos Industrializados) and ICMS (state VAT) apply on importation. [Note: NCM classification, current II rates, and any applicable suspension (ex-tarifário) should be verified with a licensed customs broker (despachante aduaneiro) and through the Receita Federal / MDIC portals before shipment.]
summary.zh: 向巴西进口电动机须符合由对外贸易和国际事务特别秘书处（SECEX）及联邦税务局（Receita Federal）管理的 SISCOMEX（综合对外贸易系统）进口注册要求。进口商须在 SISCOMEX 登记，并持有有效的 RADAR（海关行为人追踪系统）操作许可。电动机按 NCM（南方共同市场共同命名法，与 HS 协调）分类：三相交流感应电机通常归入 NCM 税号 8501.52（多相交流电机，功率超过 750 W 但不超过 75 kW）或其他相应税号，具体取决于功率等级。电动机的进口税（Imposto de Importação，II）税率因 NCM 子税号而异，可能适用 Mercosur 共同对外关税（TEC）及相关贸易协定税率。INMETRO 合格证书须作为清关支持文件提交——无有效 INMETRO 证书的电机将在口岸被阻扣。此外，进口时还须缴纳 IPI（工业品税）和 ICMS（州增值税）。【注：NCM 分类、现行 II 税率及任何适用的关税暂停（ex-tarifário）应在发货前通过持牌报关行（despachante aduaneiro）及 Receita Federal / MDIC 门户核实。】
summary.zht: 向巴西進口電動機須符合由對外貿易和國際事務特別秘書處（SECEX）及聯邦稅務局（Receita Federal）管理的 SISCOMEX（綜合對外貿易系統）進口注冊要求。進口商須在 SISCOMEX 登記，並持有有效的 RADAR（海關行為人追蹤系統）操作許可。電動機按 NCM（南方共同市場共同命名法，與 HS 協調）分類：三相交流感應電機通常歸入 NCM 稅號 8501.52（多相交流電機，功率超過 750 W 但不超過 75 kW）或其他相應稅號，具體取決於功率等級。電動機的進口稅（Imposto de Importação，II）稅率因 NCM 子稅號而異，可能適用 Mercosur 共同對外關稅（TEC）及相關貿易協定稅率。INMETRO 合格證書須作為清關支持文件提交——無有效 INMETRO 證書的電機將在口岸被阻扣。此外，進口時還須繳納 IPI（工業品稅）和 ICMS（州增值稅）。【注：NCM 分類、現行 II 稅率及任何適用的關稅暫停（ex-tarifário）應在發貨前通過持牌報關行（despachante aduaneiro）及 Receita Federal / MDIC 門戶核實。】

standards_or_laws: Decreto-Lei 37/1966 and Decreto 6.759/2009 — Brazilian Customs Regulation (Regulamento Aduaneiro)
NCM 8501.52 (and related headings under Chapter 85 — Mercosur Common Nomenclature, HS-aligned)
Lei 9.933/1999 — INMETRO certificate required at customs for compulsory-certified products
SISCOMEX — Sistema Integrado de Comércio Exterior (administered by Receita Federal / MDIC)

summary.en: China has its own customs declaration system (GACC — General Administration of Customs of China) for export. Chinese exporters file an export customs declaration (出口报关单) under HS-aligned China Customs tariff codes; three-phase AC motors export under HS heading 8501.52 or related codes. No pre-export third-party registration equivalent to SISCOMEX exists. Chinese manufacturers exporting to Brazil are responsible for providing correct technical documentation (commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin, technical datasheet, and the INMETRO certificate) for Brazilian import clearance, but the Brazilian import process itself is the importer's obligation. China–Brazil trade is not covered by a preferential tariff agreement that reduces the standard Mercosur TEC rate for motors.
summary.zh: 中国有自己的出口海关申报系统（GACC——海关总署）。中国出口商按 HS 协调的中国海关税号申报出口（出口报关单）；三相交流电机通常在 HS 税号 8501.52 或相关税号下出口。不存在等同于 SISCOMEX 的出口前第三方注册要求。向巴西出口的中国制造商须提供正确的技术文件（商业发票、装箱单、原产地证书、技术规格书及 INMETRO 证书）用于巴西进口清关，但巴西进口程序本身是进口商的义务。中巴贸易未受惠于降低电机 Mercosur TEC 标准税率的优惠关税协定。
summary.zht: 中國有自己的出口海關申報系統（GACC——海關總署）。中國出口商按 HS 協調的中國海關稅號申報出口（出口報關單）；三相交流電機通常在 HS 稅號 8501.52 或相關稅號下出口。不存在等同於 SISCOMEX 的出口前第三方注冊要求。向巴西出口的中國製造商須提供正確的技術文件（商業發票、裝箱單、原產地證書、技術規格書及 INMETRO 證書）用於巴西進口清關，但巴西進口程序本身是進口商的義務。中巴貿易未受惠於降低電機 Mercosur TEC 標準稅率的優惠關稅協定。

standards_or_laws: China HS 8501.52 (three-phase AC motors export classification — GACC tariff schedule)
No SISCOMEX or equivalent pre-import registration system in China for motor exports

gap.en: The Brazilian import clearance framework introduces three gaps relative to standard Chinese export practice: (1) SISCOMEX/RADAR — the Brazilian importer must have active SISCOMEX/RADAR registration; Chinese exporters cannot fulfil this obligation; (2) INMETRO certificate as customs document — the INMETRO certificate of conformity is a mandatory customs clearance document for compulsory-certified products; a motor shipped without this certificate will be detained at the Brazilian border; (3) Tax burden — Brazilian imports of electric motors attract the Mercosur TEC import duty rate on top of IPI and ICMS, increasing landed cost significantly compared with the Chinese domestic market. The NCM classification must be verified precisely because misclassification triggers penalties. China–Brazil have no FTA or preferential tariff scheme reducing the motor import duty.
gap.zh: 与标准中国出口惯例相比，巴西进口清关框架引入了三项差距：(1) SISCOMEX/RADAR——巴西进口商须持有有效的 SISCOMEX/RADAR 注册；中国出口商无法履行这一义务；(2) INMETRO 证书作为清关文件——INMETRO 合格证书是强制认证产品的必备清关文件；未附此证书的电机将在巴西边境被扣押；(3) 税收负担——巴西进口电动机须缴纳 Mercosur TEC 进口关税，叠加 IPI 和 ICMS，使到岸成本显著高于中国国内市场。NCM 分类须精确核实，分类错误将触发处罚。中巴之间不存在降低电机进口关税的自由贸易协定或优惠关税安排。
gap.zht: 與標準中國出口慣例相比，巴西進口清關框架引入了三項差距：(1) SISCOMEX/RADAR——巴西進口商須持有有效的 SISCOMEX/RADAR 注冊；中國出口商無法履行這一義務；(2) INMETRO 證書作為清關文件——INMETRO 合格證書是強制認證產品的必備清關文件；未附此證書的電機將在巴西邊境被扣押；(3) 稅收負擔——巴西進口電動機須繳納 Mercosur TEC 進口關稅，疊加 IPI 和 ICMS，使到岸成本顯著高於中國國內市場。NCM 分類須精確核實，分類錯誤將觸發處罰。中巴之間不存在降低電機進口關稅的自由貿易協定或優惠關稅安排。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SISCOMEX import registration and valid INMETRO certificate are required for Brazilian customs clearance of compulsory-certified motors; import duties (II, IPI, ICMS) apply
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent Brazilian-side import registration obligation on the Chinese exporter; standard GACC export declaration applies

source.publisher: Presidência da República — Casa Civil (official Brazilian Customs Regulation)

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese motor exporters must ensure the Brazilian importer holds SISCOMEX/RADAR registration and a current INMETRO certificate before shipment. A motor without a valid INMETRO certificate cannot clear Brazilian customs. Import duty rates under the Mercosur TEC and applicable taxes should be confirmed with a licensed Brazilian customs broker before pricing the transaction. No preferential tariff scheme between China and Brazil reduces the motor import duty burden.
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国电机出口商须确保巴西进口商在发货前持有 SISCOMEX/RADAR 注册及有效的 INMETRO 证书。无有效 INMETRO 证书的电机无法通过巴西海关清关。在确定交易价格前，应向持牌巴西报关行确认 Mercosur TEC 进口税率及适用税费。中巴之间不存在降低电机进口税负担的优惠关税安排。
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國電機出口商須確保巴西進口商在發貨前持有 SISCOMEX/RADAR 注冊及有效的 INMETRO 證書。無有效 INMETRO 證書的電機無法通過巴西海關清關。在確定交易價格前，應向持牌巴西報關行確認 Mercosur TEC 進口稅率及適用稅費。中巴之間不存在降低電機進口稅負擔的優惠關稅安排。
